title: Mellow
description: This mod is for QuestCraft, it automatically reduces the initial render distance - then slowly ramps back up again over a short period of time.
body:
Mellow is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod that smoothly lowers render distance during loading and gradually increases it after joining a world. By starting at 2 chunks and ramping up to 6 chunks over time, Mellow reduces initial lag and stuttering while keeping exploration smooth and responsive.

It's designed to reduce the initial memory and performance demand on QuestCraft as the client loads into a server.
